package service

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for service_tests_import_gin:
// service-level tests depend on gin when the service contract is supposed to be transport-neutral.
type TaskService struct {
	repo TaskRepository
}

type TaskRepository interface {
	Create(ctx context.Context, title string) (*Task, error)
	GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Task, error)
}

type Task struct {
	ID    string
	Title string
	Done  bool
}

func NewTaskService(repo TaskRepository) *TaskService {
	return &TaskService{repo: repo}
}

func (s *TaskService) CreateTask(ctx context.Context, title string) (*Task, error) {
	return s.repo.Create(ctx, title)
}

func (s *TaskService) GetTask(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Task, error) {
	return s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
}

type mockTaskRepo struct{}

func (m *mockTaskRepo) Create(ctx context.Context, title string) (*Task, error) {
	return &Task{ID: "1", Title: title, Done: false}, nil
}

func (m *mockTaskRepo) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Task, error) {
	return &Task{ID: id, Title: "test", Done: false}, nil
}

func TestTaskService_CreateTask(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()
	c, _ := gin.CreateTestContext(w)

	svc := NewTaskService(&mockTaskRepo{})

	task, err := svc.CreateTask(c.Request.Context(), "write tests")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("unexpected error: %v", err)
	}

	if task.Title != "write tests" {
		t.Errorf("expected title 'write tests', got '%s'", task.Title)
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"task": task})

	if w.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Errorf("expected status 200, got %d", w.Code)
	}
}

func TestTaskService_GetTask(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()
	c, _ := gin.CreateTestContext(w)
	c.Request = httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/tasks/1", nil)

	svc := NewTaskService(&mockTaskRepo{})

	task, err := svc.GetTask(c.Request.Context(), "1")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("unexpected error: %v", err)
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"task": task})

	if w.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Errorf("expected status 200, got %d", w.Code)
	}
}
